_note: D3.C.2 clean PASS example #2 — 10×8 m UK secondary-school classroom with 3 entrances (main S + fire-exit N + adjoining-room W) and glazed S wall. 16 LED panels in 4×4 grid, 300 lux target, achieved 446 lux. Z1 perimeter (4 luminaires on glazed S wall) daylight-linked + Z2 interior (12 luminaires) on occupancy. 3 switches at 3 latch sides. All 10 INVs PASS.

selection_source.citation: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 (typical recessed LED panel UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories)

calculation_summary.ugr_status: UGR ≤ 19 — confirm from photometric data (classroom task)
assumptions: UF = 0.62 from CIBSE LG7 §6.2 standard reflectance table 0.7/0.5/0.2 at RI=1.5 (next-lower band for actual RI=1.93)
MF = 0.80 for clean classroom LED on a 3-year cleaning cycle (CIBSE TM 3-25)
Working plane = 700 mm (BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x classroom — task at student desk height)
Lumen-method N=10.75 → round UP to 11; bumped to 16 for 4×4 grid symmetry + S/H margin

drawing_notes: All luminaires: 600×600 LED recessed panel, 4500 design lm, 36W, 4000K, CRI ≥ 80
Maintained illuminance 300 lux per BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x (classroom task at student desks)
Z1 perimeter (4 luminaires on glazed S wall, within 1500 mm) on daylight-linked 0-10V dimming
Z2 interior (12 luminaires, 3 row circuits) on occupancy detection with manual override at SW01/SW02/SW03
All circuits 6A MCB curve B per IET OSG App C lighting standard (144W per circuit << 1104W 80% limit)

3 switches at 3 entrances: SW01 2-gang at S main entrance (controls Z1+Z2 master), SW02 1-gang at N fire-exit (controls row C-L04), SW03 1-gang at W adjoining-room door (controls row C-L03) — all 1200 mm AFF latch side
Manual override at every entrance satisfies Approved Doc L (Part L 2021) §6 user-control requirement
Lamp efficacy 125 lm/W ≥ Part L 2021 Table 6.2 target 95 lm/W (PASS)

rationale.chat_summary: 10×8 m UK secondary-school classroom — 300 lux target per BS EN 12464-1 Table 5.x classroom. 16 LED panels @ 4500 lm in 4×4 grid achieve 446 lux (INV-1 PASS, 48 % headroom over target). 3 entrances on 3 different walls (main S + fire-exit N + adjoining-room W) → 3 switches at 3 latch sides (INV-3 PASS). Z1 perimeter (4 luminaires on glazed S wall, daylight-linked) + Z2 interior (12 luminaires, occupancy) → INV-7 PASS. Clean compliant scenario; all 10 INVs PASS.

sections.title: Why this example exists
sections.summary: Demonstrates the multi-entrance + multi-wall switch-coverage path (INV-3 sub-check 1 with switches.length ≥ entrances.length when controls_protocol is NOT DALI) and the perimeter-zone path (INV-7 with a glazed wall present). Companion to uk-undersized (failure) and uk-part-l-fail (Part L failure) — together cover happy + sad paths across the 10 INVs. Drawn from a real secondary-school classroom brief (main door + fire exit + adjoining-classroom communicating door — common UK school layout).

sections.title: Lumen-method walk
sections.summary: A=80 m². Hm=3000−700=2300 mm. RI=(10×8)/(2.3×18)=80/41.4=1.93 → ontology table key 1.5 (next-lower band per LG7 §6.2; alternative would be table key 2.0 with UF=0.67 — using 1.5 is conservative). UF=0.62 (LED_PANEL_600 at RI=1.5, reflectances 0.7/0.5/0.2). MF=0.80 (clean classroom LED). N = (300×80)/(4500×0.62×0.80) = 24000/2232 = 10.75 → round UP to 11. Bumped to 16 for 4×4 grid symmetry (next square layout up from 11; also gives generous S/H margin and matches the 600 mm ceiling grid module). Achieved = (16×4500×0.62×0.80)/80 = 35712/80 = 446.4 lux ≥ 300 target → INV-1 PASS with 49 % headroom.

decisions.label: Lux target 300 lx maintained
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x classroom task category sets 300 lx maintained at desk plane.

decisions.label: 16 luminaires from N=10.75 rounded UP to 11, bumped to 4×4=16
decisions.summary: Lumen method gives 10.75; round UP to 11. Engineer chose 16 for symmetric 4×4 grid (cleaner ceiling-grid alignment + S/H headroom + uniformity at desk plane). Over-provision at 49 % is acceptable for classroom (uniformity matters more than exact target lux).
decisions.rule: Round up; never round down; bump for grid symmetry + uniformity
decisions.code_clause: CIBSE LG7 §6 + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.3 (uniformity Uo ≥ 0.6 for classroom task)

sections.title: S/H ratio enforcement
sections.summary: 16 luminaires in 4×4 grid in 10000×8000 room, 300 mm edge clearance. S_x=(10000−600)/3=3133 mm. S_y=(8000−600)/3=2467 mm. Hm=2300 mm. SHR_max=1.5 (LED_PANEL_600 ontology default). Limit = 1.5 × 2300 = 3450 mm. S_x=3133 ≤ 3450 PASS (91 % of limit); S_y=2467 ≤ 3450 PASS (72 % of limit). INV-2 PASS.

sections.title: Multi-entrance switch coverage (INV-3 PASS)
sections.summary: 3 entrances on 3 walls + controls_protocol=switched (NOT DALI) → INV-3 Rule 1 requires switches.length ≥ entrances.length. Emitted 3 switches: SW01 2-gang at S main entrance position (4600, 200) controlling Z1 daylight + Z2 occupancy master; SW02 1-gang at N fire-exit position (6800, 7800) controlling C-L04 row local; SW03 1-gang at W adjoining-room door position (200, 2800) controlling C-L03 row local. Each switch placed 200 mm PAST the latch frame on the latch side at 1200 mm AFF per [switching-rules#height] + [switching-rules#latch-side] (IET OSG App E §E1.4). door_swing values drive latch-side derivation per entrance.

decisions.label: 3 switches for 3 entrances (no DALI consolidation)
decisions.summary: controls_protocol=switched means each entrance needs an independent wall switch on its latch side. The S main entrance uses a 2-gang to give an independent toggle for the daylight zone (Z1) vs the interior zone (Z2). The N fire-exit and W adjoining-room each get a 1-gang controlling the nearest row circuit only — appropriate for secondary entrances where occupants typically enter from the main door.

sections.title: Part L 2021 zoning (INV-6 + INV-7 PASS)
sections.summary: Glazed S wall → Z1 perimeter zone (4 luminaires within 1500 mm of S wall — row 0 at y=300) on daylight-linked 0-10V dimming per Approved Doc L 2021 §6 + BS EN 15193-1:2017 §6. Z2 interior (12 luminaires, rows 1-3) on occupancy detection. controls.required=['occupancy','daylight_linking'] both delivered (INV-6 sub-checks 2+3 PASS). Lamp efficacy 125 lm/W ≥ 95 lm/W target (INV-6 sub-check 4 PASS). controls.part_l_assessed=true + part_l_compliant=true (INV-6 sub-check 1 PASS). Zone perimeter consistency: glazed_walls=['south'] AND zone Z1.zone_type='perimeter' AND Z1 luminaires within 6m of S wall — INV-7 Rule 3 PASS.

sections.title: Switch placement detail
sections.summary: Per-entrance switch placement derivation per [switching-rules#latch-side] (IET OSG App E §E1.4 — switch sits 200 mm past the latch frame on the latch side, INSIDE the room). SW01 at S main entrance, door_swing=inward_latch_right, door spans x∈[3500,4400], latch frame at x=4400, +200 mm to the right (latch side) → x=4600, y=200 (200 mm inside S wall edge at y=0). SW02 at N fire-exit, door_swing=outward_latch_left, door spans x∈[7000,7900], latch frame at x=7000, −200 mm to the left (latch side) → x=6800, y=7800 (200 mm inside N wall edge at y=8000). SW03 at W adjoining-room door, door_swing=inward_latch_left, door spans y∈[3000,3800], latch frame at y=3000, −200 mm down (latch side) → y=2800, x=200 (200 mm inside W wall edge at x=0). Each switch_side='latch'. height_aff_mm=1200 for all three within [1150, 1250] band.

sections.title: Circuit topology (INV-4 + INV-5 PASS)
sections.summary: 4 row circuits C-L01..C-L04, one per row. Each circuit's luminaire_ids share single row_index (0, 1, 2, 3 respectively) → no Z-pattern, INV-4 PASS. Homeruns all exit on W wall at row y_mm ∈ {300, 2767, 5233, 7700}. INV-5: 144 W per circuit ≤ 1104 W (6A 80% cap) — 13 % of headroom each.

sections.title: Assumptions
sections.summary: UF + SHR_max from CIBSE LG7 §6.2 standard ontology defaults; engineer must confirm against manufacturer photometric file before issue. MF=0.80 assumes a 3-year cleaning cycle in a clean classroom. Reflectances 0.7/0.5/0.2 (white ceiling + light wall + mid-grey floor) standard CIBSE.

decisions.label: Working plane 700 mm (student desk height)
decisions.summary: BS EN 12464-1:2021 Table 5.x classroom sets the task at student desk plane, conventionally 700 mm AFF in UK secondary schools (per spacing-rules#working-plane-defaults).
decisions.rule: Working plane = 700 for classroom per spacing-rules

decisions.label: UF = 0.62 (RI=1.5 next-lower band for actual RI=1.93)
decisions.summary: CIBSE LG7 §6.2 standard reflectance table 0.7/0.5/0.2 conservative selection (using table-key RI=2.0 with UF=0.67 would give achieved 482 lux instead of 446 lux; either choice PASSes INV-1).
decisions.rule: Standard CIBSE reflectance table; next-lower RI band

invariants.evidence: Lumen method: N=16 LED_PANEL_600 × 4500 lm × UF=0.62 × MF=0.80 / 80 m² = achieved_illuminance_lux=446.4 lux ≥ target 300 lux (Rule 1 PASS). Lumen-method required N = (300×80)/(4500×0.62×0.80) = 24000/2232 = 10.75 → round UP to 11; engineer bumped to 16 for 4×4 grid symmetry + S/H margin. Per [spacing-rules#lumen-method-formula] + ontology LED_PANEL_600 UF table at RI=1.5 (next-lower band for actual RI=1.93), reflectances 0.7_0.5_0.2.

S/H ratio: Hm=2300 mm, SHR_max=1.5 (LED_PANEL_600 ontology default), limit=3450 mm. 4 cols × 4 rows grid: S_x=(10000−600)/3=3133 mm ≤ 3450 PASS (91 % of limit); S_y=(8000−600)/3=2467 mm ≤ 3450 PASS (72 % of limit). Per [spacing-rules#shr-max-default] + CIBSE LG7 §6.2.

Switch coverage: 3 entrances on 3 different walls (S main, N fire-exit, W adjoining-room) with distinct door_swing. controls_protocol=switched (NOT DALI) → INV-3 Rule 1: switches.length ≥ entrances.length → 3 ≥ 3 PASS. Per [switching-rules#latch-side] (IET OSG App E §E1.4) each switch sits 200 mm PAST the latch frame on the latch side: SW01 (4600, 200) — S latch at x=3500+900=4400, +200 right; SW02 (6800, 7800) — N latch at x=7000, −200 left; SW03 (200, 2800) — W latch at y=3000, −200 down. All at 1200 mm AFF within [1150, 1250] band per [switching-rules#height] (BS 7671 §553.1.1 + IET OSG App E §E1.4). All three switch_side='latch'. Rule 3 PASS.

Circuit topology: 4 row circuits C-L01..C-L04 each feed exactly one row of 4 luminaires sharing single row_index (0, 1, 2, 3 respectively). max(row_indices) − min(row_indices) = 0 per circuit ≤ 1 → no Z-pattern, no diagonal jumps. homerun_endpoints all on W wall (x_mm=0) at row y_mm ∈ {300, 2767, 5233, 7700} — all four required keys (x_mm, y_mm, wall) present, wall ∈ {N,S,E,W}. Rule 4a + 4b PASS.

Circuit load: each of C-L01..C-L04 has total_load_w=144 W = 4 × 36 W ≤ 0.8 × 6 A × 230 V = 1104 W (6A MCB limit). All four circuits PASS the 80% continuous-load cap per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §433.1.1 + IET OSG App A. 144 W is 13 % of headroom each — ample spare.

Part L compliance: inputs.new_build=true (classroom, new-build secondary school) AND jurisdiction=england_wales triggers Part L 2021 §6 enforcement. (1) controls.part_l_assessed=true PASS. (2) controls.required=['occupancy','daylight_linking'] includes 'occupancy' PASS. (3) glazed_walls=['south'] non-empty AND controls.required includes 'daylight_linking' PASS. (4) controls.lamp_efficacy_lm_per_w=125 ≥ 95 PASS. All four sub-checks PASS. controls.part_l_compliant=true. Per Approved Doc L 2021 §6 + BS EN 15193-1:2017 §6.

Zone assignment: 16 luminaires reference {Z1, Z2}; 1:1 referential integrity (each luminaire to exactly one zone). Z1 perimeter has 4 luminaires (L01-L04 at y=300, within 1500 mm of S glazed wall per controls.perimeter_zones[{wall:S, depth_mm:1500}]). Z2 interior has 12 luminaires (L05-L16, rows 1-3). inputs.glazed_walls=['south'] non-empty AND Z1.zone_type='perimeter' AND Z1 luminaires within 6m of S wall — Rule 3 perimeter consistency PASS per [switching-rules#perimeter-circuit] iff-clause. Zone control protocols match zone_type: Z1=daylight_linked (perimeter), Z2=occupancy (interior). Rule 7 PASS per [control-rules#part-l-daylight].

selection_source.photometric_source='ontology_default'; citation='CIBSE LG7 §6.2 (typical recessed LED panel UF + SHR_max) + BS EN 12464-1:2021 §4.4 (LLMF maintenance categories)' — matches ontology LED_PANEL_600.photometric._citation exactly. No inputs.photometric_override supplied; generator fell back to ontology defaults. Rule 8 PASS per ontology._verification_status=engineer_typical_C2.

drafting_furniture present with all 4 required blocks (title_block + scale_bar + dimensions[2] + luminaire_schedule). All annotations declare font_family='Arial' + explicit font_size_pt ∈ {8, 10}. No {{placeholder}} substrings in any text field. dimensions.length=2 ≥ 2 minimum. Rule 9 PASS.

Schema validation PASSED (precondition: golden CI gate). All top-level required fields populated: drawing_type='lighting_layout', version='1.4.0', room (incl. room_type='classroom' enum), calculation_summary (target+compliant+non_compliance_flags+assumptions), rationale (chat_summary 40-500 + sections ≥1), invariants (10 entries INV-01..INV-10). Mode=full_drawing — full_drawing required-fields all present: luminaire_type, luminaires (16), switches (3), circuits (4), controls, drawing_notes (8), zones (2), drafting_furniture, selection_source. non_compliance_flags=[] (vacuously valid). controls.part_l_compliant=true so Rule 3 cross-check trivially PASS. Rule 10 PASS.

title_block.project_name: UK secondary-school classroom — D3.C.2 multi-entrance PASS demo
